name: Provenika redocking starter benchmark (oncology co-crystal complexes)
note: EDITABLE STARTER SET for redocking validation. Each entry is a PDB ID and the 3-letter PDB chemical-component ID of its co-crystallised inhibitor. Verify and extend before citing any success rate — this is a seed, not a validated benchmark. Requires AutoDock Vina + Open Babel to run (cad/validate.py --redock). Research only; not medical advice.
